metadata.title: Sumangali Home Foods | Authentic Homemade Chutney, Health Mix & Pickles
metadata.description: For lovers of authentic homemade food — and a growing Karnataka marketplace empowering women artisans through the FPO model. Handcrafted chutney, health mix, pickles. Order via WhatsApp.

brand.name: Sumangali
brand.tagline: Preserving Authentic Tastes for Future Generations
brand.taglineSecondary: Crafted with Love for Authentic Food Lovers
brand.heroSubtitle: Janaki Sudath Darshanapur brings time-honored recipes, handcrafted in small batches — and a bold vision to onboard women artisans across Karnataka through a shared FPO-powered marketplace.
brand.storyQuote: Every spice tells a story. Every batch carries a memory.

home.featuredSubtitle: Heritage recipes, slow-roasted and ground in small batches — the way authentic food was always meant to taste
home.founderText: A passionate keeper of culinary heritage, Janaki founded Sumangali Home Foods as the first spark of a larger mission — to help every woman in Karnataka who crafts authentic food join a common marketplace, powered by Farmer Producer Organisation (FPO) models that build collective strength and fair livelihoods.
home.trustTitle: Why Authentic Food Lovers Choose Us
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Taste Heritage in Every Bite?
home.ctaText: Message us on WhatsApp to place your order. Delivered across Karnataka and Andhra Pradesh.

about.title: About Janaki
about.subtitle: Sharing heritage flavors with families who cherish authentic food
about.intro: Janaki Sudath Darshanapur is a passionate food artisan from Darshanapur, Yadgir district, Karnataka. With deep roots in North Karnataka and Andhra culinary traditions, she transforms treasured family recipes into wholesome products that nourish families far and wide.
about.mission: To preserve and share authentic, preservative-free foods made with love in home kitchens — and to scale this model across Karnataka by empowering women artisans through FPO collectives and a shared digital marketplace.
about.value1: Every batch is prepared with care using fresh, whole ingredients in a clean home kitchen — nothing artificial, ever.
about.value2: Recipes passed down through generations, roasted and ground using time-honored methods that unlock true flavor.
about.value3: Building a Karnataka-wide network where women home-food makers onboard through FPO structures — gaining branding, packaging support, market access, and income under their own control.
about.location: Darshanapur, Shahpur Taluk, Yadgir District, Karnataka — PIN 585309

products.title: Our Creations
products.subtitle: Handcrafted goodness from our kitchen to your table
products.orderMessage: Hello! I would like to order: {product}

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: From grandmother's kitchen to your family's table
story.timeline1: Recipes for chutney pudi, sathu maavu, and pickles were cherished in Janaki's family for generations — each one a living memory.
story.timeline2: Friends and neighbors began requesting her handcrafted powders and laddus, drawn to flavors they couldn't find anywhere else.
story.timeline3: Janaki launched Sumangali Home Foods so authentic food lovers everywhere could taste the heritage she grew up with.
story.timeline4: Sumangali evolves into a platform vision — onboarding women artisans and women-led FPOs across Karnataka onto one common marketplace, leveraging collective marketing, heritage packaging, and direct customer reach.
story.step1: We handpick the finest lentils, millets, nuts, and spices — only what meets our standards for purity and aroma.
story.step2: Ingredients are sun-dried and carefully roasted in small batches, unlocking depth of flavor that fast production never can.
story.step3: Ground fresh and packed with care — no preservatives, no shortcuts, just honest food.

health.title: Why Homemade?
health.subtitle: Nutrition you can trust, flavors you will never forget
health.chutneyText: Rich in plant-based protein from lentils and nuts, chutney pudi is a beloved South Indian condiment. Mix with ghee or sesame oil for idli, dosa, or rice — nourishment and nostalgia in every spoon.
health.sathuText: Our health mix combines sprouted grains, roasted pulses, and millets — packed with protein, iron, and fiber. Perfect as porridge for babies or as nutritious laddus for the whole family.
health.pickleText: Traditional sun-dried pickles made without chemical preservatives. Bold, layered flavors from mango, lime, and regional spices — just like grandmother made.
health.tip1: Mix chutney powder with ghee or coconut oil for idli and dosa.
health.tip2: Stir sathu maavu into warm milk for baby porridge.
health.tip3: Enjoy pickles with hot rice and a spoon of ghee.

contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you. Order via WhatsApp, join as a women artisan or FPO partner, or send us a message.

contact.joinText: Are you a home-food maker, women-led FPO, or SHG group in Karnataka? We are building a common platform to list authentic products, share heritage branding, and reach customers together.

footer.tagline: Preserving authentic tastes — empowering Karnataka women through FPO-powered marketplace

vision.title: A Common Marketplace for Karnataka Women
vision.subtitle: Scaling Sumangali Home Foods into a platform where every woman artisan and women-led FPO can onboard, sell authentic homemade foods, and build livelihoods together.
vision.intro: Across Karnataka, thousands of women prepare chutney powders, health mixes, pickles, and millet foods in home kitchens — carrying recipes their mothers and grandmothers passed down. Yet many lack direct market access, branding support, and fair prices. Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs) have proven that when women farmers and food makers unite, they gain bargaining power, eliminate middlemen, and reach customers nationwide. Sumangali Home Foods, founded by Janaki Sudath Darshanapur, is the pilot — and the blueprint — for a Karnataka-wide women food marketplace.
vision.modelText: Under India's FPO movement, over 800 women-only producer companies now operate across the country, with lakhs of women farmers registered as members. Successful women-led FPOs in Karnataka — from millet networks spanning dozens of villages to home-food collectives — have shown that collective action unlocks storage, grading, packaging, and marketing at scale. Government initiatives also link FPOs to digital platforms like e-NAM and ONDC. Sumangali leverages this proven model for authentic home foods: women join or form FPOs, meet shared quality standards, use heritage branding and packaging, and list products on one common marketplace.
vision.stat1Label: Women-only FPOs across India — a proven collective model for rural prosperity
vision.stat2Label: Of FPO-linked farmers are women — growing role in decision-making and agribusiness
vision.stat3Label: One Karnataka marketplace — many women artisans, one trusted brand family
vision.pillarsTitle: Four Pillars of the Sumangali Marketplace
vision.pillar1Text: Onboard through women-led FPOs and SHGs for shared strength.
vision.pillar1Detail: Individual home kitchens join village-level groups and FPO structures — gaining legal entity status, shared godowns, and collective negotiation power that no single artisan could achieve alone.
vision.pillar2Text: One digital storefront connecting artisans to authentic food lovers.
vision.pillar2Detail: Products from across Karnataka — Yadgir, Hubballi, Bengaluru Rural, and beyond — reach customers through WhatsApp ordering, exhibitions, and future integration with national digital commerce networks.
vision.pillar3Text: Shared packaging, labels, and quality standards every member can trust.
vision.pillar3Detail: Training in grading, packaging, processing, and branding — the top needs identified by women FPO members in Karnataka research — delivered through the Sumangali heritage label system.
vision.pillar4Text: Direct sales, transparent pricing, income under women's control.
vision.pillar4Detail: Inspired by women-led FPO success stories — from millet networks earning lakhs in turnover to mango collectives reaching urban buyers directly — every member keeps more of what she earns.
vision.pathSubtitle: From home kitchen to Karnataka marketplace — a clear path for every artisan.
vision.step1Text: Prepare authentic, preservative-free foods using family recipes — chutney powders, laddus, pickles, millet mixes, and more.
vision.step2Title: Join a Women FPO or SHG
vision.step2Text: Connect with an existing women-led Farmer Producer Organisation in your district, or form a new collective with neighboring artisans.
vision.step3Text: Receive guidance on hygiene, small-batch quality, heritage packaging, and labeling — so every product earns customer trust.
vision.step4Text: Your products appear alongside Sumangali Home Foods on the common platform — reaching authentic food lovers across Karnataka and beyond.
vision.audience1Text: Individual artisans crafting chutney, health mixes, pickles, or baby foods in home kitchens across Karnataka.
vision.audience2Text: Existing Farmer Producer Companies seeking a branded marketplace, packaging support, and direct customer channels.
vision.audience3Text: NGOs, government schemes, and mentors who want to strengthen women's livelihoods through the FPO food marketplace model.
vision.ctaQuote: Every woman who preserves authentic taste deserves a marketplace that preserves her dignity and income.
